A student can answer who, what, where, why and how questions from the lesson.

revisionNotes: Read 'Glass Bangles' once for enjoyment and once for understanding.
Learn the keyword definitions, not only the spellings.
Write 3-5 points about the main idea.
Practise one short answer and one long answer from the topic.
